title: eleocharis thermalis
intro: Eleocharis thermalis, also known as the Spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, and treating skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Eleocharis thermalis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
